settings.heading: Submit a support ticket
settings.subheading: Describe your issue and our team will respond within 1 business day.

settings.heading: Tell us what's happening
settings.body: The more detail you provide, the faster we can help. Required fields are marked with an asterisk.

settings.heading: Check self-service resources first.
settings.body: Our FAQ, compatibility checker, and troubleshooting guides resolve most issues without a ticket.
